full_text:
Lady Yan 嚴氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Yan (嚴氏). Warns Lü Bu about attacking Cao Cao and points out problems in Chen Gong’s plan. Lady Yan was affiliated with Lu Bu.
